---
title: "Modeling the distribution of commercially important, sound-producing species using CGFS survey data"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  rmdformats::downcute:
  highlight: zenburn
html_document :
  toc: true
toc_float: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = getwd())                                # garde le working dir actif
knitr::opts_knit$set(envir = globalenv())                               # utilise l'env global
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message=FALSE,warning=FALSE)
```

```{r include=FALSE}

family_colors <- c(
  "tweedie" = "#66c2a5",
  "deltagamma" = "#fc8d62",
  "deltalognormal" = "#99CCFF",
  "deltagammapoissonlink" = "#e78ac3",
  "deltalognormalpoissonlink" = "#8da0cb",
  "gamma" = "#ffd92f",
  "lognormal" = "#a6d854"
)

```

# 1. Data

<br/>
 
```{r echo=FALSE}

print(sp_scientific)

```
<br/>


```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

knitr::include_graphics(here("01_DATA", "prop_pres_sp.png"))

```

<br/>

## 1.1. CGFS data : biomass of *`r sp_scientific`* 

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=6, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

plot_west <- NULL
plot_east <- NULL

if (isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {

EC_sf <- vect(here("01_DATA", "shapefiles", "Western_English_Channel_extension", 
                        "Western_English_Channel_extension.shp"))%>%
  sf::st_as_sf() %>%
  sf::st_transform(4326)

if (sp_scientific == "Trachurus trachurus") {
  plot_west <- ggOceanMaps::basemap(data = EC_sf) +   
  ggplot2::geom_sf(data = EC_sf, fill = NA) +        
  ggspatial::geom_spatial_point(data = data_CGFS_west, 
                     aes(x = lon, y = lat, size = totalWeightKg),
                     color = "blue", alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_size_continuous(name ="Biomass (kg)") +
  facet_wrap(~ year, nrow = 2) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL)
} else {
 plot_west <- ggOceanMaps::basemap(data = EC_sf) +   
  ggplot2::geom_sf(data = EC_sf, fill = NA) +        
  ggspatial::geom_spatial_point(data = data_CGFS_west, 
                     aes(x = lon, y = lat, 
                         color = factor(presence_absence), 
                         size  = totalWeightKg), 
                     alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("0" = "red", "1" = "blue"), 
                     labels = c("Absence", "Presence"), 
                     name = "Occurence") +
  scale_size_continuous(name ="Biomass (kg)") +
  facet_wrap(~ year, nrow=2) +
  labs(x=NULL, y=NULL) 
}
}

if (isTRUE(East_English_Channel)) {

EC_sf <- vect(here("01_DATA", "shapefiles", "split_English_Channel", 
                    "east_English_Channel.shp"))%>%
  sf::st_as_sf() %>%
  sf::st_transform(4326)
  
plot_east <- ggOceanMaps::basemap(data = EC_sf) +   
  ggplot2::geom_sf(data = EC_sf, fill = NA) +        
  ggspatial::geom_spatial_point(data = data_CGFS_east, 
                     aes(x = lon, y = lat, 
                         color = factor(presence_absence), 
                         size  = totalWeightKg), 
                     alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("0" = "red", "1" = "blue"), 
                     labels = c("Absence", "Presence"), 
                     name = "Occurence") +
  scale_size_continuous(name ="Biomass (kg)") +
  facet_wrap(~ year, nrow=2) +
  labs(x=NULL, y=NULL)

}

patchwork::wrap_plots(Filter(Negate(is.null), list(plot_west, plot_east)), ncol = 1)

```

<br/>  

## 1.2. CGFS data : density of biomass of *`r sp_scientific`* 

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=6, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

plot_west <- NULL
plot_east <- NULL

if (isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {

  EC_sf <- vect(here("01_DATA", "shapefiles", "Western_English_Channel_extension", 
                        "Western_English_Channel_extension.shp"))%>%
  sf::st_as_sf() %>%
  sf::st_transform(4326)
  
if (sp_scientific == "Trachurus trachurus") {
  plot_west <- ggOceanMaps::basemap(data = EC_sf) +   
  ggplot2::geom_sf(data = EC_sf, fill = NA) +        
  ggspatial::geom_spatial_point(data = data_CGFS_west, 
                     aes(x = lon, y = lat, size = densityKgKm2),
                     color = "blue", alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_size_continuous(name ="Biomass density (kg/km²)") +
  facet_wrap(~ year, nrow = 2) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL)
} else {
 plot_west <- ggOceanMaps::basemap(data = EC_sf) +   
  ggplot2::geom_sf(data = EC_sf, fill = NA) +        
  ggspatial::geom_spatial_point(data = data_CGFS_west, 
                     aes(x = lon, y = lat, 
                         color = factor(presence_absence), 
                         size  = densityKgKm2), 
                     alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("0" = "red", "1" = "blue"), 
                     labels = c("Absence", "Presence"), 
                     name = "Occurence") +
  scale_size_continuous(name ="Biomass density (kg/km²)") +
  facet_wrap(~ year, nrow=2) +
  labs(x=NULL, y=NULL) 
}
}

if (isTRUE(East_English_Channel)) {

EC_sf <- vect(here("01_DATA", "shapefiles", "split_English_Channel", 
                    "east_English_Channel.shp"))%>%
  sf::st_as_sf() %>%
  sf::st_transform(4326)

plot_east <- ggOceanMaps::basemap(data = EC_sf) +   
  ggplot2::geom_sf(data = EC_sf, fill = NA) +        
  ggspatial::geom_spatial_point(data = data_CGFS_east, 
                     aes(x = lon, y = lat, 
                         color = factor(presence_absence), 
                         size  = densityKgKm2), 
                     alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("0" = "red", "1" = "blue"), 
                     labels = c("Absence", "Presence"), 
                     name = "Occurence") +
  scale_size_continuous(name ="Biomass density \n(kg/km²)") +
  facet_wrap(~ year, nrow=2) +
  labs(x=NULL, y=NULL)

}

patchwork::wrap_plots(Filter(Negate(is.null), list(plot_west, plot_east)), ncol = 1)

```
<br/>  

## 1.3. Autocorrelation in density of biomass data 

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {
  p_Moran_west <- compute_plot_Moran(data_CGFS_west, region = "west")
  p_resids_west <- residuals_withoutRF(data_CGFS_west, region = "west")
  west_plots <- Filter(Negate(is.null), list(p_Moran_west, p_resids_west))
  if (length(west_plots)) print(patchwork::wrap_plots(west_plots, ncol = 2, widths = c(1, 2)))
}

```
Moran's index (left), Residuals map of fit without random effect

<br/>  

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(East_English_Channel)) {
  p_Moran_east <- compute_plot_Moran(data_CGFS_east, region = "east")
  p_resids_east <- residuals_withoutRF(data_CGFS_east, region = "east")
  east_plots <- Filter(Negate(is.null), list(p_Moran_east, p_resids_east))
  if (length(east_plots)) print(patchwork::wrap_plots(east_plots, ncol = 2, widths = c(1, 2)))
}

```

<br/>  
<br/>  

# 2. Mesh 

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(East_English_Channel) & isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {
  ggpubr::ggarrange(mesh_by_region$west$plot_mesh, mesh_by_region$east$plot_mesh)
} else if (isTRUE(East_English_Channel) & !isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {
  mesh_by_region$east$plot_mesh
} else if (!isTRUE(East_English_Channel) & isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {
  mesh_by_region$west$plot_mesh
} 

```
 <br/>  
blue points = centers of triangles located at sea  
red points = centers of triangles positioned on land  
In land triangles, the spatial range is reduced to 10% of the range used at sea (range_fraction = 0.1).

<br/>  
<br/>  



# 3. Model candidates 

## 3.1. Fits Statuses

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

statuses_type <- c("models_valid", "models_sanity_failed", "models_fit_failed")

sanity_df <- imap_dfr(sanity_by_region, function(responses_by_region, region) {
  imap_dfr(responses_by_region, function(model_status, response) {
    keep <- intersect(names(model_status), statuses_type)
    map_dfr(keep, function(status) {
      families <- names(model_status[[status]])
      if (length(families) == 0) return(NULL)
      tibble(region = region,
             response = response,
             family = families,
             status = status)
    })
  })
})

sanity_df <- sanity_df %>%
  mutate(region = factor(region, levels = c("west", "east")))


ggplot(sanity_df, aes(x = response, y = family, fill = status)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.4) +
  facet_wrap(~ region) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("models_valid" = "#2ca25f",
               "models_fit_failed" = "#de2d26",
               "models_sanity_failed" = "#ffb703"), 
    labels = c("models_valid" = "Converged fit with consistent \nestimates", 
               "models_fit_failed" = "Non-convergent fit", 
               "models_sanity_failed" = "Converged fit rejected after \npost-fit consistency checks")) +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(  legend.spacing.y = unit(0.9, "cm"),
  legend.key.height = unit(0.9, "cm"),
  legend.text = element_text(lineheight = 1.1))


```


## 3.2. Parameters estimates
 
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=8, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

params_all %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = family, y = estimate, shape = component, color = family)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), size=0.8,
                width = 0, position = position_dodge(width = 0.6)) +
  facet_grid(parameter ~ region + response, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = "Family",  y = "Estimate", shape = "Component",
    title = "sdmTMB parameters estimates") +
  scale_color_manual(values = family_colors)+
  guides(color = "none") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "top")

```

<br/>

range: distance beyond which two locations can be considered effectively independent (spatial correlation becomes negligible, approximately ~0.13 correlation).  

sigma_O: marginal standard deviation of the spatial random field (omega); it measures the average amplitude of spatial variation that is persistent over time and not explained by the model. Lower values indicate that covariates explain the spatial structure more effectively.  

sigma_E: marginal standard deviation of the spatio-temporal random field (epsilon); it measures the average amplitude of spatial variation that changes over time and is not explained by the model. Lower values indicate that the spatio-temporal structure is already well captured by the other components of the model.  

<br/>
<br/>


## 3.3. DHARMA 

Observation–prediction discrepancies are projected into a standardized normal space, independently of the probability family.
A randomized quantile residual represents the standardized position of an observation within the model’s predictive distribution.

<br/>
<br/>

## 3.3. Data simulations from fitted models - DHARMa residuals, RMSE, MAE

Simulation of 1000 datasets from fitted models and then:  
* plot DHARma residuals  
* plot DHARMa Moran's I test for distance-based autocorrelation  
* compute RMSE & MAE between observed and simulated data  
 

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=10, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {
  metrics_west <- simulation_errors_by_region$west
  
  mean_totalWeightKg_west <- mean(data_CGFS_west$totalWeightKg)
  mean_densityKgKm2_west <- mean(data_CGFS_west$densityKgKm2)
  
  obs_means_west <- tibble(
    response = c("totalWeightKg", "densityKgKm2"),
    mean_obs  = c(mean_totalWeightKg_west, mean_densityKgKm2_west))
  
  west_MAE <- ggplot(metrics_west %>% filter(response %in% obs_means_west$response),
                     aes(x = family, y = MAE, color = family)) +
    scale_y_log10() +    
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.2) +
    facet_wrap(~ response, scales = "free_y") +
    geom_hline(data = obs_means_west, aes(yintercept = mean_obs),
               linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = family_colors)+
    labs(x = NULL, y = "MAE", subtitle = "Dotted line = average observations") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
          legend.position = "none")
  
  west_RMSE <- ggplot(metrics_west %>% filter(response %in% obs_means_west$response),
                      aes(x = family, y = RMSE, color = family)) +
    scale_y_log10() +    
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.2) +
    facet_wrap(~ response, scales = "free_y") +
    geom_hline(data = obs_means_west, aes(yintercept = mean_obs),
               linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = family_colors)+
    labs(x = NULL, y = "RMSE", 
         title = "West CGFS",
         subtitle = "Dotted line = average observations") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
          legend.position = "none")
  
  plots <- Filter(Negate(is.null), list(west_RMSE, west_MAE)) 
  if (length(plots)) patchwork::wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 1)
}

```

<br/>

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=10, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(East_English_Channel)) {
  metrics_east <- simulation_errors_by_region$east

  mean_totalWeightKg_east <- mean(data_CGFS_east$totalWeightKg)
  mean_densityKgKm2_east <- mean(data_CGFS_east$densityKgKm2)

  obs_means_east <- tibble(
    response = c("totalWeightKg", "densityKgKm2"),
    mean_obs  = c(mean_totalWeightKg_east, mean_densityKgKm2_east))
  
  east_MAE <- ggplot(metrics_east %>% filter(response %in% obs_means_east$response),
                     aes(x = family, y = MAE, color = family)) +
    scale_y_log10() +    
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.2) +
    facet_wrap(~ response, scales = "free_y") +
    geom_hline(data = obs_means_east, aes(yintercept = mean_obs),
               linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = family_colors)+
    labs(x = NULL, y = "MAE", 
         subtitle = "Dotted line = average observations") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
          legend.position = "none")
  
  east_RMSE <- ggplot(metrics_east %>% filter(response %in% obs_means_east$response),
                      aes(x = family, y = RMSE, color = family)) +
    scale_y_log10() +    
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.2) +
    facet_wrap(~ response, scales = "free_y") +
    geom_hline(data = obs_means_east, aes(yintercept = mean_obs),
               linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = family_colors)+
    labs(x = NULL, y = "RMSE", 
         title = "East CGFS",
         subtitle = "Dotted line = average observations") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), 
          legend.position = "none")
  
  plots <- Filter(Negate(is.null), list(east_RMSE, east_MAE)) 
  if (length(plots)) patchwork::wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 1)
}

```

<br/>
<br/>

## 3.5. AIC weights

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=4, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(East_English_Channel) & isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {
 AIC_all <-bind_rows(AIC_by_region$west, AIC_by_region$east)
 AIC_df <- AIC_all %>%
   mutate(region = factor(region, levels = c("west", "east")))
} 

if (!isTRUE(East_English_Channel) & isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {
  AIC_df <- AIC_by_region$west
} 

if (isTRUE(East_English_Channel) & !isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {
  AIC_df <- AIC_by_region$east
} 

ggplot(AIC_df,
       aes(x = weight*100, y = 1, color = family, shape = family)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  facet_grid(response ~ region) +
  scale_color_manual(values = family_colors)+
  labs(x = "AIC weight (%)", y = NULL, color = "Family", shape = "Family") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "top")

```



## 3.5. Spatial bloc cross-validation 

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {

west_3folds <- readRDS(here("01_DATA/folds_CV/west_3folds.rds"))
ggplot(west_3folds) +
  geom_point(aes(x = X, y = Y, color = factor(spatial_zone)),
             size = 5, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(x = X, y = Y, label = fold_id),
            size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ year, nrow=2) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Western English Channel — 21 folds (3 per year)", 
       color = "Zone", x = NULL, y = NULL)
}

```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=6, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) blockedCV_by_region$west$cv_scores

```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=6, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {
  
  blockedCV_summary_west <- imap_dfr(blockedCV_by_region$west$cv_outputs,
                                function(resp_list, response) {
                                  imap_dfr(resp_list, function(cv, family) {
                                    tibble(response = response,
                                           family = family,
                                           n_folds_tot = length(cv$pdHess),
                                           n_converged = sum(cv$pdHess),
                                           pourcent_converged = 100 * mean(cv$pdHess),
                                           all_converged = isTRUE(cv$converged))
                                  })
                                })
  blockedCV_summary_west
  
}

```


```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(East_English_Channel)) {
  
east_4folds <- readRDS(here("01_DATA/folds_CV/east_4folds.rds"))
ggplot(east_4folds) +
  geom_point(aes(x = X, y = Y, color = factor(spatial_zone)),
             size = 5, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(x = X, y = Y, label = fold_id),
            size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ year, nrow=2) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Eastern English Channel — 28 folds (4 per year)", 
       color = "Zone", x = NULL, y = NULL)
}

```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=6, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(East_English_Channel)) blockedCV_by_region$east$cv_scores

```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=6, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(East_English_Channel)) {
  
  blockedCV_summary_east <- imap_dfr(blockedCV_by_region$east$cv_outputs,
                                function(resp_list, response) {
                                  imap_dfr(resp_list, function(cv, family) {
                                    tibble(response = response,
                                           family = family,
                                           n_folds_tot = length(cv$pdHess),
                                           n_converged = sum(cv$pdHess),
                                           pourcent_converged = 100 * mean(cv$pdHess),
                                           all_converged = isTRUE(cv$converged))
                                  })
                                })
  blockedCV_summary_east
  
}

```

<br/>

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=4, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(East_English_Channel) & isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {
 blockedCV_all <-bind_rows(blockedCV_by_region$west$cv_scores, 
                     blockedCV_by_region$east$cv_scores)

 blockedCV_all_df <- blockedCV_all %>%
  mutate(region = factor(region, levels = c("west", "east"))) %>%
  group_by(region, response) %>%
  mutate(delta_sumLL = sum_loglik - max(sum_loglik))%>%
  ungroup()
} 

if (!isTRUE(East_English_Channel) & isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {
  blockedCV_all <- blockedCV_by_region$west$cv_scores
  blockedCV_all_df <- blockedCV_all %>%
    group_by(response) %>%
    mutate(delta_sumLL = sum_loglik - max(sum_loglik))%>%
    ungroup()
} 

if (isTRUE(East_English_Channel) & !isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {
  blockedCV_all <- blockedCV_by_region$east$cv_scores
  blockedCV_all_df <- blockedCV_all %>%
    group_by(response) %>%
    mutate(delta_sumLL = sum_loglik - max(sum_loglik))%>%
    ungroup()
} 

ggplot(blockedCV_all_df,
       aes(x = delta_sumLL, y = 1, color = family, shape = family)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  facet_grid(response ~ region) +
  scale_color_manual(values = family_colors)+
  labs(x = "CV sum_loglik", y = NULL, color = "Family", shape = "Family") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "top")

```

<br/>

## 3.6. Random cross-validation 

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=6, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) randomCV_by_region$west$cv_scores


```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=6, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {
  randomCV_summary_west <- imap_dfr(randomCV_by_region$west$cv_outputs,
                                function(resp_list, response_name) {
                                  imap_dfr(resp_list, function(cv, family_name) {
                                    tibble(response = response_name,
                                           family = family_name,
                                           n_folds_tot = length(cv$pdHess),
                                           n_converged = sum(cv$pdHess),
                                           pourcent_converged = 100 * mean(cv$pdHess),
                                           all_converged = cv$converged)
                                  })
                                })
  randomCV_summary_west
}

```

<br/>

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=6, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(East_English_Channel)) randomCV_by_region$east$cv_scores

```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=6, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(East_English_Channel)) {
  randomCV_summary_east <- imap_dfr(randomCV_by_region$east$cv_outputs,
                                function(resp_list, response_name) {
                                  imap_dfr(resp_list, function(cv, family_name) {
                                    tibble(response = response_name,
                                           family = family_name,
                                           n_folds_tot = length(cv$pdHess),
                                           n_converged = sum(cv$pdHess),
                                           pourcent_converged = 100 * mean(cv$pdHess),
                                           all_converged = isTRUE(cv$converged))
                                  })
                                })
  randomCV_summary_east
}

```

<br/>

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=4, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

if (isTRUE(East_English_Channel) & isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {
 randomCV_all <-bind_rows(randomCV_by_region$west$cv_scores, 
                     randomCV_by_region$east$cv_scores)

 randomCV_all_df <- randomCV_all %>%
  mutate(region = factor(region, levels = c("west", "east"))) %>%
  group_by(region, response) %>%
  mutate(delta_sumLL = sum_loglik - max(sum_loglik))%>%
  ungroup()
} 

if (!isTRUE(East_English_Channel) & isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {
  randomCV_all <- randomCV_by_region$west$cv_scores
  randomCV_all_df <- randomCV_all %>%
    group_by(response) %>%
    mutate(delta_sumLL = sum_loglik - max(sum_loglik))%>%
    ungroup()
} 

if (isTRUE(East_English_Channel) & !isTRUE(West_English_Channel)) {
  randomCV_all <- randomCV_by_region$east$cv_scores
  randomCV_all_df <- randomCV_all %>%
    group_by(response) %>%
    mutate(delta_sumLL = sum_loglik - max(sum_loglik))%>%
    ungroup()
} 

ggplot(randomCV_all_df,
       aes(x = delta_sumLL, y = 1, color = family, shape = family)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  facet_grid(response ~ region) +
  scale_color_manual(values = family_colors)+
  labs(x = "CV sum_loglik", y = NULL, color = "Family", shape = "Family") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "top")

```

<br/>
<br/>


# 4. Projection grid

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=6, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
plot_west <- grid_by_region$west$plot_grid
plot_east <- grid_by_region$east$plot_grid
patchwork::wrap_plots(Filter(Negate(is.null), list(plot_west, plot_east)), ncol = 2)
```
<br/>
<br/>


# 5. Predictions

<br/>

## 5.1. Western English Channel predictions

<br/>
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_tw_est <- prediction_maps$west$totalWeightKg[["tweedie"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_tw_est)) west_plot_tw_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_dgm_est <- prediction_maps$west$totalWeightKg[["deltagamma"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_dgm_est)) west_plot_dgm_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_dln_est <- prediction_maps$west$totalWeightKg[["deltalognormal"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_dln_est)) west_plot_dln_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_dgmpl_est <- prediction_maps$west$totalWeightKg[["deltagammapoissonlink"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_dgmpl_est)) west_plot_dgmpl_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_dlnpl_est <- prediction_maps$west$totalWeightKg[["deltalognormalpoissonlink"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_dlnpl_est)) west_plot_dlnpl_est
```
<br/>
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_tw_est <- prediction_maps$west$densityKgKm2[["tweedie"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_tw_est)) west_plot_tw_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_dgm_est <- prediction_maps$west$densityKgKm2[["deltagamma"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_dgm_est)) west_plot_dgm_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_dln_est <- prediction_maps$west$densityKgKm2[["deltalognormal"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_dln_est)) west_plot_dln_est
```
<br/>
<br/>
<br/>

## 5.2. Eastern English Channel predictions
<br/>
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
east_plot_tw_est <- prediction_maps$east$totalWeightKg[["tweedie"]]
if (!is.null(east_plot_tw_est)) east_plot_tw_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
east_plot_dgm_est <- prediction_maps$east$totalWeightKg[["deltagamma"]]
if (!is.null(east_plot_dgm_est)) east_plot_dgm_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
east_plot_dln_est <- prediction_maps$east$totalWeightKg[["deltalognormal"]]
if (!is.null(east_plot_dln_est)) east_plot_dln_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
east_plot_dgmpl_est <- prediction_maps$east$totalWeightKg[["deltagammapoissonlink"]]
if (!is.null(east_plot_dgmpl_est)) east_plot_dgmpl_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
east_plot_dlnpl_est <- prediction_maps$east$totalWeightKg[["deltalognormalpoissonlink"]]
if (!is.null(east_plot_dlnpl_est)) east_plot_dlnpl_est
```
<br/>
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
east_plot_tw_est <- prediction_maps$east$densityKgKm2[["tweedie"]]
if (!is.null(east_plot_tw_est)) east_plot_tw_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
east_plot_dgm_est <- prediction_maps$east$densityKgKm2[["deltagamma"]]
if (!is.null(east_plot_dgm_est)) east_plot_dgm_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
east_plot_dln_est <- prediction_maps$east$densityKgKm2[["deltalognormal"]]
if (!is.null(east_plot_dln_est)) east_plot_dln_est
```
<br/>
<br/>
<br/>


# 6. Simulations : coefficient variation 

<br/>
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_tw_est <- plots_cv_all$west$totalWeightKg[["tweedie"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_tw_est)) west_plot_tw_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_dgm_est <- plots_cv_all$west$totalWeightKg[["deltagamma"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_dgm_est)) west_plot_dgm_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_dln_est <- plots_cv_all$west$totalWeightKg[["deltalognormal"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_dln_est)) west_plot_dln_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_dgmpl_est <- plots_cv_all$west$totalWeightKg[["deltagammapoissonlink"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_dgmpl_est)) west_plot_dgmpl_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_tw_est <- plots_cv_all$west$densityKgKm2[["tweedie"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_tw_est)) west_plot_tw_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_dgm_est <- plots_cv_all$west$densityKgKm2[["deltagamma"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_dgm_est)) west_plot_dgm_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_dln_est <- plots_cv_all$west$densityKgKm2[["deltalognormal"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_dln_est)) west_plot_dln_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_gm_est <- plots_cv_all$west$totalWeightKg[["gamma"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_gm_est)) west_plot_gm_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_gm_est <- plots_cv_all$west$densityKgKm2[["gamma"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_gm_est)) west_plot_gm_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_ln_est <- plots_cv_all$west$totalWeightKg[["lognormal"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_ln_est)) west_plot_ln_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
west_plot_ln_est <- plots_cv_all$west$densityKgKm2[["lognormal"]]
if (!is.null(west_plot_ln_est)) west_plot_ln_est
```
<br/>
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
east_plot_tw_est <- plots_cv_all$east$totalWeightKg[["tweedie"]]
if (!is.null(east_plot_tw_est)) east_plot_tw_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
east_plot_dgm_est <- plots_cv_all$east$totalWeightKg[["deltagamma"]]
if (!is.null(east_plot_dgm_est)) east_plot_dgm_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
east_plot_dln_est <- plots_cv_all$east$totalWeightKg[["deltalognormal"]]
if (!is.null(east_plot_dln_est)) east_plot_dln_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
east_plot_dgmpl_est <- plots_cv_all$east$totalWeightKg[["deltagammapoissonlink"]]
if (!is.null(east_plot_dgmpl_est)) east_plot_dgmpl_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
east_plot_tw_est <- plots_cv_all$east$densityKgKm2[["tweedie"]]
if (!is.null(east_plot_tw_est)) east_plot_tw_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
east_plot_dgm_est <- plots_cv_all$east$densityKgKm2[["deltagamma"]]
if (!is.null(east_plot_dgm_est)) east_plot_dgm_est
```
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=5, fig.width=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
east_plot_dln_est <- plots_cv_all$east$densityKgKm2[["deltalognormal"]]
if (!is.null(east_plot_dln_est)) east_plot_dln_est
```
